title: delve and golang bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
delve
[1.24.1-3.0.1]
- Disable DWARF compression which has issues (Alex Burmashev)

golang
[1.24.6-1]
- Update to Go 1.24.6 (fips-1)
- Resolves: RHEL-106461

[1.24.4-3]
- Re-enable debguginfo and waive rpminspect result
- Resolves: RHEL-101454

[1.24.4-2]
- Add LD_FLAGS for stripping binaries
- Resolves: RHEL-93238
full_text:
delve
[1.24.1-3.0.1]
- Disable DWARF compression which has issues (Alex Burmashev)

golang
[1.24.6-1]
- Update to Go 1.24.6 (fips-1)
- Resolves: RHEL-106461

[1.24.4-3]
- Re-enable debguginfo and waive rpminspect result
- Resolves: RHEL-101454

[1.24.4-2]
- Add LD_FLAGS for stripping binaries
- Resolves: RHEL-93238

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20767.html
